segments.text: He's completely locked in and in French we'd say...
segments.original_text: El lock-in está completo y en francés podemos decir que…

segments.text: He's on fire! He's on fire!
segments.original_text: Il est vené. Il est vené.

full_text: He's locked in! Locked in? Yeah, okay, okay. He's completely locked in and in French we'd say... He's on fire! He's on fire!
